metadata.title: Ink
metadata.description: Hand write or draw directly between paragraphs in your notes using a digital pen, stylus, or Apple pencil. Useful for handwriting, sketches, scribbles, or even math equations and scientific notation. Runs on the tldraw framework and drawing provides an infinite canvas.

regex.source: .setText(`Ink is all about enabling stylus use directly in your markdown notes.`)
regex.target: .setText(`Ink 旨在直接在您的 Markdown 笔记中使用手写笔`)

regex.source: .setText(`Here's a quick rundown to help you get started...`)
regex.target: .setText(`以下为快速概览，可以帮助您开始使用……`)

regex.source: .setText(`In any markdown note, run the following command to begin writing where your cursor is.`)
regex.target: .setText(`In any markdown note, run the following command to begin writing where your cursor is.`)

regex.source: .setText(`You can turn them on in the settings (and restart Obsidian) if you'd like to begin using them.`)
regex.target: .setText(`You can turn them on in the settings (and restart Obsidian) if you'd like to begin using them.`)

regex.source: .setText(`Ink files live in your vault and can sync with it to other devices.`)
regex.target: .setText(`Ink files live in your vault and can sync with it to other devices.`)

regex.source: .setText(`If using Obsidian Sync, turn on "Sync all other types" in the Obsidian Sync settings.`)
regex.target: .setText(`If using Obsidian Sync, turn on "Sync all other types" in the Obsidian Sync settings.`)

regex.source: .setText(`Ink is under construction. This means it has features missing and sometimes has bugs.`)
regex.target: .setText(`Ink is under construction. This means it has features missing and sometimes has bugs.`)

regex.source: .setText(`If you notice any, please report them through the link in the settings.`)
regex.target: .setText(`If you notice any, please report them through the link in the settings.`)

regex.source: .setText("Hand write or draw directly between paragraphs in your notes.")
regex.target: .setText("Hand write or draw directly between paragraphs in your notes.")

regex.source: .setText(`You may have noticed that your handwriting lines have started disapearing...`)
regex.target: .setText(`You may have noticed that your handwriting lines have started disapearing...`)

regex.source: .setText(`Hiding old strokes helps keep pen latency down and the writing experience smooth.`)
regex.target: .setText(`Hiding old strokes helps keep pen latency down and the writing experience smooth.`)

regex.source: .setText(`Never fear though, all your strokes still exist and will become visible again later.`)
regex.target: .setText(`Never fear though, all your strokes still exist and will become visible again later.`)

regex.source: .setText(`You can adjust the stroke limit in the settings.`)
regex.target: .setText(`You can adjust the stroke limit in the settings.`)

regex.source: .setText(`Customise the attachment folder in Ink's settings.`)
regex.target: .setText(`Customise the attachment folder in Ink's settings.`)

regex.source: .setText(`Remove an embed section through the menu next to the lock button.`)
regex.target: .setText(`Remove an embed section through the menu next to the lock button.`)

regex.source: .setText(`Additional problem solving tips added to Ink's settings.`)
regex.target: .setText(`Additional problem solving tips added to Ink's settings.`)

regex.source: .setName(`Where should Ink files be saved when created in a note?`)
regex.target: .setName(`在笔记中创建的 Ink 文件应该被保存在何处？`)

regex.source: .setName("Show frame around drawing when not editing")
regex.target: .setName("在非编辑状态下显示绘图边框")

regex.source: .setDesc(`For a more intuitive experience, turn on "Slash commands" in "Obsidian Settings" / "Core Plugins" or install and set up the community plugin "Slash Commander".`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`为了获得更直观地使用体验，打开Obsidian设置-核心插件中的“斜杠指令”，或安装启用社区插件“Slash Commander”.`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`If using an iPad, the Apple pencil "Scribble" setting can interfere with input in Ink sections. Disable it in iPadOS settings for a better experience.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果您使用iPad，Apple Pencil 的“随手写”功能可能会干扰到本插件的书写。建议在 iPadOS 设置中关闭该功能以获得更好的体验`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`If using "Obsidian Sync", turn on "Sync all other types" in the Obsidian sync settings.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果使用 Obsidian 官方同步，请打开同步设置中的“同步所有其他类型文件”`)

regex.source: .setDesc("If disabled, you will not be able to add new writing embeds and those already embedded will appear as raw code. Existing writing files will be hidden in Obsidian but still exist on disk. Changing this setting will require a restart of Obsidian to take effect.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用此功能，您将无法添加新的手写(Writing)，已经嵌入的将显示为原始代码。在Obsidian中现有的手写文件会被隐藏，但它们仍然存在于磁盘上。更改此设置需要重启Obsidian才能生效")

regex.source: .setDesc("If disabled, you will not be able to add new drawing embeds and those already embedded will appear as raw code. Existing drawing files will be hidden in Obsidian but still exist on disk. Changing this setting will require a restart of Obsidian to take effect.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用此功能，您将无法添加新的绘图(Drawing)，已经嵌入的将显示为原始代码。在Obsidian中现有的绘图文件会被隐藏，但它们仍然存在于磁盘上。更改此设置需要重启Obsidian才能生效")

regex.source: .createEl("p", { text: `For information on this plugin's development, visit the links below. Feel free to leave comments in the development diaries on YouTube.` })
regex.target: .createEl("p", { text: `有关此插件开发的更多信息，请访问以下链接。欢迎在YouTube上的发展日记中留下评论。` })

regex.source: .createEl("p", { text: `While editing a Markdown file, run the action 'Insert new hand drawn section' to embed a drawing canvas.` })
regex.target: .createEl("p", { text: `当编辑一个 MarkDown 文件时，运行“Insert new hand drawn section”操作，以嵌入一个画板` })

regex.source: .createEl("p", { text: `While editing a Markdown file, run the action 'Insert new handwriting section' to embed a section for writing with a stylus.` })
regex.target: .createEl("p", { text: `当编辑一个 MarkDown 文件时，运行“Insert new handwriting section”操作，以嵌入一个用笔书写的部分` })

regex.source: .createEl("summary", { text: `This plugin is in an Alpha state (Expand for details)` })
regex.target: .createEl("summary", { text: `此插件正处于 Alpha 开发阶段（展开以查看更多）` })

regex.source: .createEl("p", { text: `What does Alpha mean? Development of products like this plugin often involve moving through multiple different stages (e.g. Alpha, Beta, then Standard Release).` })
regex.target: .createEl("p", { text: `Alpha 是什么意思？插件产品开发通常涉及经历多个不同的阶段（例如：Alpha、Beta，然后是标准发布版本）` })

regex.source: .createEl("p", { text: `Alpha, the current stage, means that this plugin is in early development and may undergo large changes that break or change previous functionality.` })
regex.target: .createEl("p", { text: `目前的版本是 Alpha, 意思是此插件正处于早期开发阶段，可能存在大型修改或更改之前的功能` })
